texto: Then you never really feel comfortable around most people. Especially your family, who probably never seemed to understand you. But as you grow up you find others like yourself, people who support you, embrace your weirdness, and love for who you are - and they become your new family." - Tara
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elizabeth Briggs: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Then you never really feel comfortable around most people. Especially your family, who probably n…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family-relationships, nerdiness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nerdiness.
